title: Agent团队
description: 持久化的团队成员通过JSONL收件箱进行通信

steps.content: 构建一个全栈应用：前端使用React，后端使用Python，包含测试
steps.annotation: 需要团队协作的大型任务

steps.content:
spawn_teammate(
  name: "frontend-dev",
  role: "React specialist"
)
spawn_teammate(
  name: "backend-dev",
  role: "Python API specialist"
)
steps.annotation: 与在一次任务后销毁的子Agent(s04)不同，团队成员会持久存在

steps.content:
[TeammateManager] Team created:
  .team/config.json written
  frontend-dev [idle] - own thread, own agent loop
  backend-dev [idle] - own thread, own agent loop
steps.annotation: 每个团队成员在独立线程中运行自己的while(tool_use)循环

steps.content:
send_message(
  to: "backend-dev",
  content: "Build the user API: GET/POST /users"
)

[backend-dev] Checking inbox... 1 new message
  From: lead
  Content: "Build the user API: GET/POST /users"
  (inbox drained after read)
steps.annotation: 收件箱是读取后清空：防止重复处理

steps.content:
[backend-dev -> frontend-dev] Reply via inbox:
  "API ready: GET /users, POST /users, GET /users/:id"
  Written to .team/inbox/frontend-dev.jsonl
steps.annotation: 团队成员通过相同的JSONL机制互相发送消息

steps.content: 团队通过基于文件的收件箱进行通信。每个团队成员都有自己的.jsonl文件 -- 追加以发送，读取以清空。
steps.annotation: JSONL收件箱解耦了发送方和接收方的时序
